temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A woman in a white button-down shirt and jeans stands in a living room, pointing at a man who is relaxing on a patterned armchair. The man, wearing a blue long-sleeve shirt and light-colored pants, looks up at her with a surprised expression. A black suitcase and duffel bag are on the coffee table in front of him. (Storyline: The woman, who has just arrived with luggage, is excitedly telling the man about their trip to Las Vegas, surprising him with the news.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Excited, triumphant. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:04) A close-up shot focuses on the woman's face. She smiles brightly, her eyes crinkling, as she looks at the man off-screen. Behind her, a framed poster for 'Les Troyens' is visible on the purple wall, along with a vase of yellow flowers. (Storyline: This shot emphasizes the woman's happiness and excitement about the trip, highlighting her emotional state.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
